endpoints.name: Request app key
endpoints.description: Request a new app key by passing username and password for app account
endpoints.notes: Replace {{KUMPEAPPS_API_KEY}} with your KUMPEAPPS API KEY.

endpoints.name: Deactivate app key
endpoints.description: Pass your app key to deactivate the key
endpoints.notes: Replace {{KUMPEAPPS_API_KEY}} with your KUMPEAPPS API KEY.

endpoints.name: Compromise app key
endpoints.description: Pass an app key to mark it as compromised. This may be submitted by the app owner or a concerned party that has optained the compromised app key.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{KUMPEAPPS_API_KEY}} with your KUMPEAPPS API KEY.

endpoints.name: Request auth key for user (login user)
endpoints.description: Obtain auth key for user that has provided their username and password to login to your app. (or to obtain an auth key for a script like IFTTT)
endpoints.notes: Replace {{KUMPEAPPS_API_KEY}} with your KUMPEAPPS API KEY.

endpoints.name: Deactivate auth key (logout)

endpoints.name: returns allowance balance and allowance transactions
endpoints.description: By passing in the appropriate options, you can view allowance balance and allowance transactions for a given user provided that they are within the masterID account of the authenticated user.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{KUMPEAPPS_API_KEY}} with your KUMPEAPPS API KEY.

endpoints.name: adds new allowance transaction to kidUserID
endpoints.description: By passing in the appropriate options, you can add an allowance transaction to a given user.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{KUMPEAPPS_API_KEY}} with your KUMPEAPPS API KEY.

endpoints.name: subscribes/unsubscribes/registers for apns push notifications
endpoints.description: subscribes/unsubscribes/registers for apns push notifications
endpoints.notes: Replace {{KUMPEAPPS_API_KEY}} with your KUMPEAPPS API KEY.

endpoints.name: returns list of chores for given user
endpoints.description:
By passing in the appropriate options, you can search for
chores assigned to a given user within the authenticated user's master account
endpoints.notes: Replace {{KUMPEAPPS_API_KEY}} with your KUMPEAPPS API KEY.

endpoints.name: adds chore for given user
endpoints.description: By passing in the appropriate options, you can add a chore to given kid username under authenticated user's master account
endpoints.notes: Replace {{KUMPEAPPS_API_KEY}} with your KUMPEAPPS API KEY.

endpoints.name: updates chore for given chore id
endpoints.description: By passing in the appropriate options, you can update the fields of a specific core within the authenticated user's master account
endpoints.notes: Replace {{KUMPEAPPS_API_KEY}} with your KUMPEAPPS API KEY.

endpoints.name: deletes chore for given chore id
endpoints.description: By passing in the appropriate options, you can delete a chore for the given chore id under authenticated user's master account
endpoints.notes: Replace {{KUMPEAPPS_API_KEY}} with your KUMPEAPPS API KEY.

endpoints.name: adds new master user account
endpoints.description: By passing in the appropriate variables this method creates a new user with master account access. (The use of this method is restricted to Superusers ONLY)
endpoints.notes: Replace {{KUMPEAPPS_API_KEY}} with your KUMPEAPPS API KEY.

endpoints.name: Create Share Link
endpoints.description: Create share link
endpoints.notes: Replace {{KUMPEAPPS_API_KEY}} with your KUMPEAPPS API KEY.

endpoints.name: Gets user info
endpoints.description: Gets user info for authenticated user
endpoints.notes: Replace {{KUMPEAPPS_API_KEY}} with your KUMPEAPPS API KEY.

endpoints.name: returns list of users
endpoints.description:
By passing in the appropriate options, you can search for
users within the authenticated user's master account
endpoints.notes: Replace {{KUMPEAPPS_API_KEY}} with your KUMPEAPPS API KEY.

endpoints.name: adds new child user
endpoints.description: By passing in the appropriate variables this method creates a new user and assigns it to the master account of the authenticated user. By default this user will have chores and allowance access.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{KUMPEAPPS_API_KEY}} with your KUMPEAPPS API KEY.

endpoints.name: updates user
endpoints.description: By passing in the appropriate variables this method updates the user's profile
endpoints.notes: Replace {{KUMPEAPPS_API_KEY}} with your KUMPEAPPS API KEY.

endpoints.name: deletes user
endpoints.description: By passing in the appropriate variables this method deletes the specified user. (This function is restricted to Superusers ONLY)
endpoints.notes: Replace {{KUMPEAPPS_API_KEY}} with your KUMPEAPPS API KEY.
